nodes.name: Black-capped vireo
nodes.summary: Black-capped vireo（Black-capped vireo，学名 Vireo atricapilla），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: Samuel Washington Woodhouse
nodes.summary: Samuel Washington Woodhouse是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白喉雨燕、Black-capped vireo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-capped vireo (Vireo atricapilla) is a small bird native to the United States and Mexico

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The black-capped vireo is threatened by brown-headed cowbird (Molothrus ater) brood parasitism, human disturbance, loss of habitat to urbanization, fire exclusion, livestock grazing, and brush control. The species was listed as an Endangered Species on 6 October 1987, "due to such factors as urbanization, grazing, range improvement, and succession."{{cite web|author=U.S
